description: A pair of round-toed navy blue casual shoes, has low-top styling and central lace-upsCanvas upper with overlay, stitched and metallic eyelet detail, branding on one side of the midfoot and a reinforced heel collarSoft tongue and innerCushioned footbed with branding on the heelThick midsole with foxing and printed branding on the backfoot region, has a striped detail along itTextured outsole with patterned grooves and brandingComes with an extra pair of lacesWarranty: 3 months for manufacturing defectsWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
